title: Exploration of the roles of CAFs in melanoma based on single-cell transcriptomics and spatial transcriptomics.
author: Hong S Zhao Y Hu A Zhang Y Li Y Rong Y Li Z Su W Zhu L
content:
S-EPMC12618749 PMC12618749 Exploration of the roles of CAFs in melanoma based on single-cell transcriptomics and spatial transcriptomics.

Background

Cancer-associated fibroblasts (CAFs) are increasingly recognized as critical contributors to the limited efficacy of immunotherapy
